title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain superior to AI at editing documents because word processors are complex software systems with structural logic that AI cannot yet navigate reliably. The talk highlights the difference between treating documents as text files versus as programs with embedded rules and dependencies.
